title: Add Tables
subtitle: Upload an erwin XML model, define a new table, and download the updated file.

upload.heading: 1. Upload XML
upload.dropHint: Drop your erwin XML file here or click to choose
upload.dropSubhint: Supports both classic erwin and erwin DM 9.x exports

addForm.heading: 3. Define a table
addForm.ddlPlaceholder:
ID NUMBER NOT NULL,
NAME VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL,
CREATED_AT DATE
addForm.downloadHint: Queue one or more tables, then finalize to enable XML generation.

staged.heading: 4. Added tables
staged.empty: No tables queued yet. Fill in the form above and click Add table.

finalize.heading: 5. Finalize & generate
finalize.confirmFinalize: Finalize the model? You won't be able to edit tables until you unfinalize.
finalize.needStagedHint: Queue at least one table to enable finalization.
finalize.needFinalizeHint: Finalize the model to enable XML generation.

messages.downloadHint: Filenames ending in _V<n>.xml are bumped to _V<n+1>.xml; otherwise an updated_ prefix is added.
